common cold.advice: Rest, drink warm fluids, and take steam. Usually resolves in 5-7 days.

migraine.advice: Rest in a dark room, stay hydrated. Consult a neurologist if frequent.

gastritis.advice: Avoid spicy food, eat small meals, and consult a gastroenterologist.

viral fever.advice: Rest, hydration, and paracetamol. See a doctor if fever persists over 3 days.
